Important Dates

WhenTrackWhat
Fri 12 Jun 2026 WorkshopsWorkshop Proposal Submissions Deadline
Tue 23 Jun 2026 Research Track(Mandatory) Abstract
Fri 26 Jun 2026 ICSE 2027 CompetitionsSubmission of competition proposals
Tue 30 Jun 2026 Research TrackSubmission
Tue 7 Jul 2026 Shadow PCShadow PC applications due
Fri 10 Jul 2026 ICSE 2027 CompetitionsNotification of accepted proposals
Fri 10 Jul 2026 Industry ChallengeSubmission of Industry Challenges
Tue 14 Jul 2026 Shadow PCHotCRP account setup and ethics training due
Fri 24 Jul 2026 WorkshopsWorkshop Proposal Acceptance Notification
Fri 24 Jul 2026 Industry ChallengeChallenges Notification
Tue 14 Jul 12:00 - Tue 4 Aug 12:00 2026 Shadow PCWrite and revise 2 reviews
Fri 7 Aug 2026 WorkshopsWorkshop Websites Online
Tue 18 Aug 2026 Shadow PCSynchronous Zoom meetings to discuss initial reviews
Wed 19 - Tue 25 Aug 2026 Shadow PCPaper bidding
Sun 30 Aug 12:00 - Tue 15 Sep 12:00 2026 Shadow PCReview 3 more papers
Fri 25 Sep 2026 Research TrackAuthor response period (3 days)
Thu 17 - Tue 29 Sep 2026 Shadow PCPeer review for other reviews on the same paper due
Wed 30 Sep 12:00 - Tue 6 Oct 12:00 2026 Shadow PCReview 1 more paper
Tue 6 Oct 2026 Shadow PCSynchronous Zoom meetings to prepare for discussions
Fri 16 Oct 2026 Student Mentoring Workshop (SMeW)Round 1 (applicants who will need a visa to visit Ireland)
Wed 7 - Tue 20 Oct 2026 Shadow PCDiscussions
Tue 20 Oct 2026 Research TrackNotification
Fri 23 Oct 2026 Software Engineering Education and Training (SEET)SEET Submissions Deadline
Fri 23 Oct 2026 Tutorials and Technical BriefingsSubmissions Deadline
Fri 23 Oct 2026 Tool Demonstration and Data ShowcaseSubmission Deadline
Fri 23 Oct 2026 SE in Society (SEIS)Submissions Deadline
Fri 23 Oct 2026 New Ideas and Emerging Results (NIER)Submissions Deadline
Fri 23 Oct 2026 SE in Practice (SEIP)Submission deadline
Tue 27 Oct 2026 Shadow PCRelease of Shadow PC reviews to the authors
Fri 30 Oct 2026 Journal-first PapersJournal First Submissions Deadline
Fri 13 Nov 2026 Industry ChallengeSubmission of Solution Papers
Fri 13 Nov 2026 Tutorials and Technical BriefingsAcceptance Notification
Fri 13 Nov 2026 SRC - ACM Student Research CompetitionSubmissions Deadline
Tue 17 Nov 2026 Research TrackRevision due
Tue 24 Nov 2026 Research TrackCamera-ready (of directly accepted papers)
Fri 27 Nov 2026 WorkshopsWorkshop Papers Submission Deadline for all Workshops
Fri 27 Nov 2026 Tutorials and Technical BriefingsAbstracts Camera Ready
Thu 3 Dec 2026 Student Mentoring Workshop (SMeW)Round 2 (applicants who do not need a visa to visit Ireland)
Fri 4 Dec 2026 ICSE 2027 CompetitionsSubmission of solution papers and organiser reports
Fri 11 Dec 2026 Journal-first PapersJournal First Acceptance Notification
Fri 11 Dec 2026 Tool Demonstration and Data ShowcaseAcceptance Notification

Fri 11 Dec 2026 WorkshopsWorkshop Papers Acceptance Notification

Fri 18 Dec 2026 Software Engineering Education and Training (SEET)SEET Acceptance Notification
Fri 18 Dec 2026 Industry ChallengeNotification of Accepted Solution papers
Fri 18 Dec 2026 SE in Society (SEIS)Acceptance notification
Fri 18 Dec 2026 New Ideas and Emerging Results (NIER)Acceptance Notification
Fri 18 Dec 2026 Research TrackFinal decision (of major revision papers)
Fri 18 Dec 2026 SRC - ACM Student Research CompetitionAcceptance Notification

Wed 13 Jan 2027 ICSE 2027 CompetitionsFinal notification for solution papers and organiser reports
